title: Iran says Lebanon conflict ‘main topic’ in US talks

snapshot.title: Iran says Lebanon conflict ‘main topic’ in US talks
snapshot.description: TEHRAN: Iran said on Sunday that the ongoing conflict in Lebanon between Israel and militant group Hezbollah will top the agenda in talks with the United States in Switzerland, as well as issues such as frozen Iranian funds and the sale of the country’s oil. “The Zionist regime continues to violate its commitment in Lebanon, this issue will be the main topic of discussion in
snapshot.author: AFP
snapshot.pageTitle: Iran says Lebanon conflict ‘main topic’ in US talks | Arab News
